goodbye-raspberry-pi-hello-mac-mini: The author upgraded their struggling Raspberry Pi 4 home server to a powerful, silent Mac Mini. This new machine now efficiently runs Plex, Home Assistant, AI models, and a dev playground.
instagenie-ai-image-bot-with-n8n: InstaGenie is a Telegram bot that uses AI to generate custom images from text, voice, or photo inputs. Built with n8n and Replicate's Flux model, it acts as a personal AI artist without traditional coding.
my-house-thinks-smart-home-ai: The author built an AI-powered smart home using Home Assistant, n8n, and Google Gemini. This setup provides ambient intelligence, from daily digests to context-aware security, moving beyond basic automation.
one-month-with-3d-printer: The author integrated a Bambu A1 3D printer into their smart home using Home Assistant, moving from printing trinkets to practical items and planning AI-powered future uses within a month.
patent-genai-database-insights: A new patent uses Generative AI to extract meaningful insights and visualizations from relational databases through natural language queries, making complex data analysis accessible to non-technical users.
